---
title: "City Armorial"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {layout-ncol=5}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import os

# Ensure this matches your folder name exactly (case-sensitive on GitHub!)
arms_dir = "arms"

if os.path.exists(arms_dir):
    # Get only SVG files
    images = sorted([f for f in os.listdir(arms_dir) if f.endswith('.svg')])
    
    for img in images:
        # Turn "new_york.svg" into "New York"
        caption = img.replace('.svg', '').replace('_', ' ').title()
        print(f"![{caption}]({arms_dir}/{img})")
else:
    print("Arms folder not found.")
```

:::
